title: ANIMAL RESCUE AND ADOPTION CENTER - 211info
text: SOUTH COAST HUMANE SOCIETY ANIMAL RESCUE AND ADOPTION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers adoption of animals that the Humane Society receives, cares for, and houses at the no-kill shelter. All adopted animals have been spayed and neutered. A foster to adopt program is available for animals that are too young to be spay/neutered. Takes in surrendered animals and animals from high-population shelters. 828 Railroad Street Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 12:30pm-4:30pm Email (541) 412-0325 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 412-0325 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Email for surrender information. FEES: Cat: $60 Dog: $100 Cost includes spay/neuter, microchip, vaccinations, deworming, and flea treatment DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Curry County Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - LOW COST WELLNESS AND VACCINE CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH COAST HUMANE SOCIETY
